name: Handa Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: Handa Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a specialty pharmaceutical company, focuses on the development of drugs for various diseases in the United States and China. It is developing various general delivery systems, including matrix system, reservoir system, matrix plus reservoir system, osmotic pump system, and colon delivery system. The company also develops modified release dosage forms, such as orally disintegrating tablets, modified release orally disintegrating tablets, modified release suspension systems, and ophthalmic modified release systems. In addition, it develops 505(b)2 and generic drugs. The company is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.
